Name: Benjamin Deeds
Description: Following the aftermath of the Avenger's vs. X-Men, and later their team-up against the Phoenix Force and its subsequent "destruction", new mutants began to appear all across the world. This was largely due in part to the efforts of both Hope Summers and the recently resurfaced Scarlet Witch, with Wanda desiring to undo the damage she had caused by triggering the mass depowering of a majority of Earth's mutant population, known as both " M-Day " and "Decimation."
